entities.name: Meeting State Transition
entities.context: Workflow (MG-6) that promotes meetings from Manifest to Processed state when processing is complete

entities.name: [M] State (Manifest)
entities.context: Meeting state indicating meeting has been manifested but not fully processed

entities.name: [P] State (Processed)
entities.context: Meeting state indicating all required intelligence blocks and artifacts are complete

entities.name: Completion Criteria
entities.context: Rules determining when a meeting can transition from [M] to [P] state

entities.name: Stakeholder Intelligence
entities.context: Required intelligence block (B01/B08) for meeting completion

entities.name: Brief
entities.context: Required intelligence block (B02) for meeting completion

entities.name: manifest.json
entities.context: Configuration file in meeting folders that tracks block generation status

entities.name: FOLLOW_UP_EMAIL.md
entities.context: Optional artifact generated when follow-up is applicable or requested

relationships.context: Scans for meetings in [M] state to evaluate for transition
Target state when completion criteria are met
Sequential progression in meeting state machine
Stakeholder intelligence block must be generated for completion
Brief block must be generated for completion
Reads manifest to check block generation status
Checks for existence as required artifact
